sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M TIREBRUSH

## Exterior / Accessories

### Chemical resistant stiff hair brush to clean all rubber surfaces.

Q²M TireBrush is designed for effective and safe cleaning of all tyre types. It combines stiff synthetic bristles with a chemical resistant handle to remove dirt and grime from rubber surfaces with control and confidence.

![Product Image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/productmain_1700x1645px_tire_brush_2020-1024x991.png)

![Hero Image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mtirebrush1-1920x1152.webp)

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**01 - What is Q²M TireBrush used for?**
Cleaning tyres and rubber surfaces.

**02 - Is it safe on all tyre types?**
Yes, it is designed for safe use on all rubber tyres.

**03 - Can it be used with strong tyre cleaners?**
Yes, the handle is chemical resistant.

**04 - Does the brush scratch rims?**
No, it is intended for tyre rubber only.

**05 - Is it comfortable to use when wet?**
Yes, the handle provides a good grip even when wet.

## Recommended Pairing

- **Q²TIRE** (500 ML) - World's first SiO2 based tire sealant. ![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/500-tire-840-840x840.png)
- **Q²M TIRE CLEANER** (500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML) - Strong and effective tyre and rubber cleaner. ![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/500-tire-cleaner-840-840x840.png)
- **Q²M TIRE APPLICATOR** - Tyre dressing applicators. ![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/productcollection_840x840px_tire_applicator_big_2020-840x840.png)
- **Q²M TIRE EXPRESS** (500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML) - The quick and easy way to make your tyres look clean and fresh. ![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/500-tire-express-840-840x840.png)

sources.cleaned_content:
# Gyeon Q2M Tire Brush

**Regular price:** Rs. 399.00

![Product Image](//themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q2M_Tire_Brush.jpg?v=1759921449&width=1946)
![Product Image](//themicrofibershop.com/cdn/shop/files/TireBrush.jpg?v=1759921449&width=1946)

## Q2M Tire Brush

### Professional Ergonomic Tire Cleaning Brush

The Q2M Tire Brush is a durable, ergonomic detailing brush designed specifically for deep-cleaning tires. With stiff yet gentle synthetic bristles and a chemical-resistant handle, it removes dirt and old dressings safely without damaging rubber surfaces.

### Key Features

- **Stiff but Gentle Bristles** - Effectively remove dirt and grime from tire rubber without causing damage.
- **Ergonomic Design** - Rounded edges and a comfortable grip for safe, controlled cleaning.
- **Chemical-Resistant Handle** - Built to withstand strong tire cleaners and degreasers.
- **Durable Construction** - Long-lasting performance even with heavy use.
- **Safe for All Tires** - Suitable for standard, performance, and white-wall tires.

### Highlights

- Specifically engineered for use with Q2M Tire Cleaner.
- Provides deep cleaning to prepare tires for fresh dressing.
- Compact and easy to maneuver in tight wheel areas.
- Professional-grade tool trusted by detailers worldwide.

### Areas of Application

- **Car Tires** - All rubber tire types, including white-wall tires.
- **SUV & 4x4 Tires** - Tough enough for larger off-road tires.
- **Motorcycle Tires** - Gentle yet effective cleaning.

### Warnings & Safe Tips

- Always use with a dedicated tire cleaner for best results.
- Do not use on painted, polished, or delicate surfaces.
- Rinse thoroughly after each use and let air dry.
- Keep out of reach of children.

**Pro Tip:** Pair the Q2M Tire Brush with Q2M Tire Cleaner. Spray generously on a wet tire, agitate with the brush, let dwell, and rinse with a pressure washer for a spotless finish.

## Customer Reviews

No reviews yet. Be the first to write a review.

# GYEON Q²M Tire Brush

**Regular price:** $5.00 CAD

**Brand:** Gyeon

**3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item**

![Product Image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/gyeon_Q2M_tire-black_brush_3000.png?v=1612358684&width=1800)

## GYEON Tire Brush

### SUPERB MAINTENANCE PRODUCTS FOR OUTSTANDING DETAILING PERFORMANCE

Stiff yet gentle synthetic hair, placed in a chemical resistant handle and an ergonomic shape combined in the Gyeon Q²M TireBrush to offer you safe and comfortable tire maintenance.

### SAFE AND ERGONOMIC

The Q²M TireBrush is designed to be as safe and effective as possible on all tire types. Its stiff synthetic hair removes dirt & grime effectively from the structure of the rubber. The ergonomic chemical resistant handle has rounded edges to avoid any damage and provide good grip even while it gets wet.

# Gyeon Tire - 500 ml

**Price:** $27.99

**Quantity Discounts:** 2+ units at $25.99 (7% savings)

**Available Sizes:** 500 ml - $27.99

**Product Code:** GY-0803

![Product Image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Tire-500-ml_1418_1_m_2877.jpg)
![Product Image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Tire-500-ml_1418_1_t_2313.jpg)
![Product Image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Tire-500-ml_1418_1_t_3315.jpg)

### Product Information

- Restore and protect your tires!
- SIO2 tire coating protects for months, not weeks
- Helps restore a deep matte finish
- Extremely hydrophobic!
- Keeps tires cleaner and for longer

### Product Description

Gyeon Tire will restore and protect your tires with one easy to use formula! After you polish your paint and protect it with a coating, the deep, glossy, clarity of the paint is really a thing of beauty. This finish makes your vehicle stand out, but if you have ugly dull tires next to this paint, it just takes away from the overall luster of the vehicle. Gyeon set out to take that same feeling we get when looking at our paint and putting it into a product for your tires. Gyeon Tire, is a SIO2 coating that leaves behind a great deal of protection and gloss, along with restoring your tire back to its natural deep matte luster. Do not confuse this product with a typical tire dressing, Gyeon Gyeon Tire is a coating through and through. It lasts months, not weeks like other dressings and the ability to repel water from the surface of the rubber it simply put, outstanding. This beading is only rivaled by the coating on your paint and it helps keep your tire cleaner for much longer. This is incredibly valuable as tires are the only part of the vehicle touching the ground, meaning that they are coming into contact with dirt, grime, UV rays, and other tough contamination. When you wash your tires, you will find that most contamination will roll off the surface, saving you valuable detailing time and effort. What are you left with you ask, just think of a deep, dark, matte looking tire with a durable layer of protection to boot. Allow your tires to stand out from the crowd with Gyeon Tire!

### Videos

- GYEON Q Tire: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k7O9v7JNsdY
- Q2Tire: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tDWJZ0xI5tw

### From The Label

**Product Description:** Long term tyre protection.
- UV protection
- Factory fresh look
- Self-cleaning properties

**Directions:** Use Q2M TireCleaner and Q2M TireBrush to clean the tyre. Rinse well. Let the tyre fully dry before application. Apply with Q2M Tire Applicator and wipe it onto the surface. Let it dry and soak into the surface. For a deep matte effect wipe after 15 minutes with a microfibre cloth. To increase durability heat the surface with a heat gun prior to application. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

### Customer Reviews

88% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 33 ratings)

**Robert M. (2/3/2023) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
Great product, they need to sell this in a larger container.

**Ashley J. (9/9/2022) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
Really liking this tire shine so far. My go-to has been Poorboy's World Bold'n'Bright for years. It provides a great, satin sheen and looks good for 2-3 weeks, but does wash off easily in a rainstorm. I decided to give this a try when it was on sale, as I've heard good things. I tried this out on my daily drivers, truck and suv. I did my truck first, after a very thorough cleaning and drying of the tire. I applied to the sidewall, rubbed in after 15 mins and let sit for about 2 days. Apparently I applied too much as I had sling off; first time ever in 3 years of ownership. For the SUV, I applied less product, let sit half an hour, and REALLY buffed it in, then did not drive for 24 hours. I had no sling off. There is a great shine to the tires now. It's more than satin but not super glossy. Has been about 2 weeks now with no loss of shine. The truck has been outside and the SUV just went through some rain storms. Water just beads off as well. Product seems to work really well after a good cleaning and LESS IS MORE when applying to tire.

**marcelo c. (5/25/2022) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
I have tried many different tire dressings, this is absolutely my favorite! It is a bit more work on application but definitely a nice look and decent longevity.
